marketing.whyHireTitle: Why hire when AI agents work 24/7?
marketing.whyHireSubtitle: Each ELEVO agent replaces the need for a full-time employee — at a fraction of the cost.
marketing.testimonial1: ELEVO completely transformed how I run my salon. The social media content alone saves me 5 hours a week. My Google reviews have nearly doubled.
marketing.testimonial2: The ROAS analysis told me I was wasting £600/month on Meta ads. Moved it to Google and my leads tripled. Paid for itself in week one.
marketing.testimonial3: ELEVO Spy caught my competitor running a discount campaign before I even knew about it. I launched a counter-offer the same day. Game changer.

about.metaDescription: ELEVO AI — 54+ AI agents that replace your entire team. Built for local businesses, ecommerce, creators, and agencies.
about.title: About ELEVO AI
about.paragraph1: ELEVO AI is the platform that replaces the need for employees with AI agents that work 24/7. We built it because we believe every business — from a solo freelancer to a growing agency — deserves an AI-powered team without the overhead.
about.paragraph2: With 54+ AI agents across marketing, sales, content, analytics, and operations, ELEVO handles the work that used to require a full team. Each agent is purpose-built for a specific role: writing content, managing social media, running ad campaigns, closing deals, and more.
about.paragraph3: Founded by James Carlin, ELEVO AI is headquartered in the United Kingdom and serves businesses across Europe, the US, and beyond. Our mission is simple: lower your customer acquisition cost and help you grow faster — with AI doing the heavy lifting.
about.paragraph4: Plans start at €29.99/month. Every plan includes a 7-day free trial.

pricing.heroSubtitle: 7-day free trial on every plan. Cancel anytime.
pricing.launchF1: All content generators (GBP posts, blog, social, email, SEO)
pricing.orbitDesc: For growing businesses ready to scale
pricing.orbitF2: ROAS & ad spend analysis (ELEVO Ads Pro™)
pricing.addonDesc: Avatar ads, URL-to-video, voiceovers — included when added to any plan.
pricing.faq1Q: How does the 7-day free trial work?
pricing.faq1A: Start your trial with any plan. You get full access for 7 days. Cancel before the trial ends and you won't be charged.
pricing.faq2A: Yes. Cancel from your account settings — no calls, no forms, instant.
pricing.faq3A: One credit = one AI generation. Most content types cost 1 credit. The Problem Solver costs 2 credits.
pricing.faq4Q: What happens when I run out of credits?
pricing.faq4A: Credits reset monthly. Upgrade or wait for the reset.
pricing.faq5Q: Does it work for my type of business?
pricing.faq5A: ELEVO works for any local or service business — restaurants, trades, salons, dentists, consultants, agencies.
pricing.faq6Q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
pricing.faq6A: Your data is yours. Export everything before you leave.
pricing.faq7A: Yes — fully available in English and Spanish, with more languages coming.
pricing.faq8A: All sales are final after payment is processed. We offer a generous 7-day free trial so you can evaluate ELEVO fully before committing.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Try ELEVO AI free for 7 days. All sales are final after payment.
pricing.ctaFootnote: 7-day free trial · Cancel anytime · ELEVO AI™
pricing.enterpriseDesc: Our team builds custom AI solutions tailored to your business. Bespoke agents, white-label setup, dedicated support.
